languages.text: {n}Друкари растягивает тонкие губы в недоброй улыбке.{/n} "Такая тварь пришлась бы по вкусу любому хозяину арены в Комморре... впрочем, шансов оказаться там у конкретно этой "погонщицы" уже не осталось — она издохнет раньше".

{n}The Drukhari's thin lips stretch into a nasty smile.{/n} "Such a creature would be to the taste of any arena owner in Commorragh... but this particular 'drover' has no chance of winding up there — it will die much sooner than that."
languages.original_text: {n}Друкари растягивает тонкие губы в недоброй улыбке.{/n} "Такая тварь пришлась бы по вкусу любому хозяину арены в Комморре... впрочем, шансов оказаться там у конкретно этой "погонщицы" уже не осталось — она издохнет раньше".

{n}The Drukhari's thin lips stretch into a nasty smile.{/n} "Such a creature would be to the taste of any arena owner in Commorragh... but this particular 'drover' has no chance of winding up there — it will die much sooner than that."

languages.text: {n}ドルーカリの薄い唇が不快な笑顔を浮かべる。{/n}「こんな生き物はコムラッグのどのアリーナ主も好むだろう...だが、この特定の「放牧者」はアリーナにたどり着くことはできない。もっと早く死んでしまうだろう」
languages.original_text: {n}The Drukhari's thin lips stretch into a nasty smile.{/n} "Such a creature would be to the taste of any arena owner in Commorragh... but this particular 'drover' has no chance of winding up there — it will die much sooner than that."

traits.locale_text: {n}ドルーカリの薄い唇が不快な笑顔を浮かべる。{n}「こんな生き物はコムラッグのどのアリーナ主も好むだろう...だが、この特定の「放牧者」はアリーナにたどり着くことはできない。もっと早く死んでしまうだろう。」

languages.text: {n}Drukhari'nin ince dudakları iğrenç bir gülümsemeye dönüşüyor.{/n} "Böyle bir yaratık, Commorragh'daki herhangi bir arena sahibinin zevkine pek uyar... Fakat bu özel Çoban'ın oraya düşme şansı yok. Yakında ölmüş olacak."
languages.original_text: {n}The Drukhari's thin lips stretch into a nasty smile.{/n} "Such a creature would be to the taste of any arena owner in Commorragh... but this particular 'drover' has no chance of winding up there — it will die much sooner than that."

traits.locale_text: {n}Drukhari'nin ince dudakları iğrenç bir gülümsemeye dönüşüyor.{/n} "Böyle bir yaratık, Commorragh'daki herhangi bir arena sahibinin zevkine pek uyar... Fakat bu özel Çoban'ın oraya düşme şansı yok. Yakında ölmüş olacak."

languages.text: {n}Los labios delgados del Drukhari se estiran en una sonrisa cruel.{/n} «Cualquier dueño de arena de Commorragh apreciaría una criatura como esa... pero este "Pastor" en particular no tiene ninguna probabilidad de acabar allí; morirá mucho antes».
languages.original_text: {n}The Drukhari's thin lips stretch into a nasty smile.{/n} "Such a creature would be to the taste of any arena owner in Commorragh... but this particular 'drover' has no chance of winding up there — it will die much sooner than that."

traits.locale_text: {n}Los labios delgados del Drukhari se estiran en una sonrisa cruel.{/n} «Cualquier dueño de arena de Commorragh apreciaría una criatura como esa... pero este "Pastor" en particular no tiene ninguna probabilidad de acabar allí; morirá mucho antes».

languages.text: {n}这位黑暗灵族薄薄的嘴唇扯出一抹恶毒的笑意。{/n}“这种生物，绝对合科摩罗任意一位竞技场主的胃口……可这‘拒生花’嘛，是没那个机会了——它绝对活不到那个时候。”
languages.original_text: {n}The Drukhari's thin lips stretch into a nasty smile.{/n} "Such a creature would be to the taste of any arena owner in Commorragh... but this particular 'drover' has no chance of winding up there — it will die much sooner than that."

traits.locale_text: {n}这位黑暗灵族薄薄的嘴唇扯出一抹恶毒的笑意。{/n}“这种生物，绝对合科摩罗任意一位竞技场主的胃口……可这‘拒生花’嘛，是没那个机会了——它绝对活不到那个时候。”

languages.text: {n}Un sourire malveillant se dessine sur les fines lèvres du Drukhari.{/n} « Une telle créature serait du goût de tout propriétaire d'arène à Commorragh... mais ce "Chasseur" n'a aucune chance de se retrouver là-bas. Il mourra bien avant. »
languages.original_text: {n}The Drukhari's thin lips stretch into a nasty smile.{/n} "Such a creature would be to the taste of any arena owner in Commorragh... but this particular 'drover' has no chance of winding up there — it will die much sooner than that."

traits.locale_text: {n}Un sourire malveillant se dessine sur les fines lèvres du Drukhari.{/n} « Une telle créature serait du goût de tout propriétaire d'arène à Commorragh... mais ce "Chasseur" n'a aucune chance de se retrouver là-bas. Il mourra bien avant. »

languages.text: {n}Der Drukhari verzieht seine schmalen Lippen zu einem bösen Lächeln.{/n} "Eine solche Kreatur wäre ganz nach dem Geschmack jedes Arenabetreibers in Commorragh ... aber dieser spezielle 'Treiber' wird dort nie auftreten ... weil er lange davor sterben wird."
languages.original_text: {n}The Drukhari's thin lips stretch into a nasty smile.{/n} "Such a creature would be to the taste of any arena owner in Commorragh... but this particular 'drover' has no chance of winding up there — it will die much sooner than that."
